Package shelter.strategy

package shelter.strategy
Strategy layer — pluggable scoring rules for animal-adopter matching. Each IMatchingStrategy implementation evaluates one criterion (species, breed, activity level, age, lifestyle, vaccination) and returns a normalized score.
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractBinaryMatchingStrategy
    Base class for binary match strategies that return either a full match or no match.
    AbstractMatchingStrategy
    Shared base class for matching strategies that need common input validation.
    AbstractOrdinalMatchingStrategy
    Base class for ordinal strategies where closer values receive stronger scores.
    AbstractRangeMatchingStrategy
    Base class for strategies that score how close a value is to a preferred range.
    ActivityLevelStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy that evaluates preference alignment between the adopter's desired activity level and the animal's activity level.
    AgePreferenceStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy that evaluates whether an animal's age fits the adopter's preferred age range.
    BreedPreferenceStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy that evaluates whether an animal's breed matches the adopter's preferred breed.
    IMatchingStrategy
    Defines a scoring rule applied by the matching system to evaluate one matching criterion for an adopter-animal pair.
    LifestyleCompatibilityStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy that evaluates whether an animal is a practical fit for the adopter's living space and daily schedule.
    MatchingCriterion
    Represents the supported criteria that may be used in the matching system.
    MatchingPreferencesPriority
    Represents one prioritized matching criterion selected by a user.
    MatchingPreferencesProfile
    Represents the full prioritized matching setup selected by a user.
    MatchingScoreCalculator
    Calculates the final match score by combining applicable strategy scores.
    SpeciesPreferenceStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy that evaluates whether an animal's species matches the adopter's preferred species.
    VaccinationPreferenceStrategy
    A concrete matching strategy related to vaccination status.
